{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accounts Clerk (Operations & Investment)",
  "description": "Strategic Outsourcing Limited (SOL) is a licensed Primary Employment Agency established in 2006. We provide all categories of staff to our clients and have managed over 100,000 Staff since inception. In 2021, SOL was one of the Top 15 employers in Nigeria by the National Pensions Commission based on the number of staff within the formal contributory pensions scheme.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accounts Clerk (Operations &amp; Investment)

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	This role plays an important part in ensuring smooth financial processing, supporting payment documentation, maintaining finance records, and assisting the finance team with operational accounting tasks.
	If you have a strong eye for detail and want to grow your accounting career within a structured corporate environment, we encourage you to apply.


Requirements


	OND / HND in Accounting, Finance or related discipline (BSc holders may apply)
	1&ndash;2 years of accounts/clerical experience preferred
	Basic proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Word
	Strong organisational and numerical skills.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;eaoffice2@solnigeria.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Accounts Clerk (Operations & Investment) Job at Strategic Outsourcing Limited (SOL)




        
    

        
        Strategic Outsourcing Limited (SOL) is a licensed Primary Employment Agency established in 2006. We provide all categories of staff to our clients and have managed over 100,000 Staff since inception. In 2021, SOL was one of the Top 15 employers in Nigeria by the National Pensions Commission based on the number of staff within the formal contributory pensions scheme.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accounts Clerk (Operations & Investment)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	This role plays an important part in ensuring smooth financial processing, supporting payment documentation, maintaining finance records, and assisting the finance team with operational accounting tasks.
	If you have a strong eye for detail and want to grow your accounting career within a structured corporate environment, we encourage you to apply.


Requirements


	OND / HND in Accounting, Finance or related discipline (BSc holders may apply)
	1–2 years of accounts/clerical experience preferred
	Basic proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Word
	Strong organisational and numerical skills.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Service Fulfilment Engineer",
  "description": "IpNX is one of Nigeria&rsquo;s fastest growing Information and Communications Technology companies, serving a multitude of needs across enterprises, small businesses and residents with innovative, world-class services.

Our ability to identify, satisfy and exceed today&rsquo;s market needs is a testament to over a decade of experience, our commitment, drive and passion realized through highly skilled and well seasoned professionals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Service Fulfilment Engineer

Job Locations:&nbsp;Abia, Kano, Lagos, Oyo, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	ipNX Nigeria is seeking a Service Fulfilment Engineer (SFE) to join our Technical Services team.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for the installation, configuration, and activation of customer services (Voice, Data &amp; Video), ensuring high-quality service delivery and customer satisfaction.


Key Responsibilities


	Execute end-to-end service provisioning for new customer installations (Fiber or Wireless).
	Perform on-site installation, configuration, and testing of customer-premises equipment (routers, switches, IP phones, ONTs).
	Conduct troubleshooting to ensure optimal service activation and performance.
	Collaborate with Network Operations Center (NOC) and other internal teams for seamless service delivery.
	Update installation and service records in internal systems (CRM/ERP/OSS tools).
	Ensure installations meet company standards for safety, performance, and aesthetics.
	Provide feedback and escalate field challenges when necessary.
	Support enterprise network deployments (remote and on-site).
	Maintain company tools, equipment, and assets.
	Mentor and supervise interns.
	Build strong relationships with customers and internal stakeholders.


Key Performance Indicators


	Installation turnaround time
	First-time-right installation rate
	Customer satisfaction levels
	Accuracy of documentation and reporting.


Requirements
Educational Qualification:


	
	B.Sc in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or related discipline (Minimum of Second Class Upper / Upper Credit).
	


Experience:


	1&ndash;2 years of experience in telecoms, ISP, or ICT environment.
	Hands-on experience with network devices (routers, switches).
	Experience in LAN/WAN design and configuration is an advantage.


Technical Skills:


	Basic understanding of IP networking (LAN/WAN, TCP/IP, DHCP, DNS).
	Knowledge of fiber optic and wireless technologies.
	Ability to configure routers and switches.
	Familiarity with troubleshooting tools (ping, traceroute, OTDR, cable testers).
	Understanding of structured cabling and network safety practices.


Soft Skills:


	Strong communication and customer service skills
	Problem-solving and analytical thinking
	Attention to detail
	Team player with a proactive attitude
	Willingness to learn and adapt.


Work Schedule:


	Monday &ndash; Friday (8:00 AM &ndash; 5:00 PM)
	Occasional weekend work may be required.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their&nbsp;CV&nbsp;to:&nbsp;lilianadefisoye@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;All candidates must ensure that they meet the minimum qualification stated.",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-18",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "IpNX Nigeria Limited"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

Service Fulfilment Engineer Job at IpNX Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        IpNX is one of Nigeria’s fastest growing Information and Communications Technology companies, serving a multitude of needs across enterprises, small businesses and residents with innovative, world-class services.

Our ability to identify, satisfy and exceed today’s market needs is a testament to over a decade of experience, our commitment, drive and passion realized through highly skilled and well seasoned professionals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Service Fulfilment Engineer

Job Locations: Abia, Kano, Lagos, Oyo, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	ipNX Nigeria is seeking a Service Fulfilment Engineer (SFE) to join our Technical Services team.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for the installation, configuration, and activation of customer services (Voice, Data & Video), ensuring high-quality service delivery and customer satisfaction.


Key Responsibilities


	Execute end-to-end service provisioning for new customer installations (Fiber or Wireless).
	Perform on-site installation, configuration, and testing of customer-premises equipment (routers, switches, IP phones, ONTs).
	Conduct troubleshooting to ensure optimal service activation and performance.
	Collaborate with Network Operations Center (NOC) and other internal teams for seamless service delivery.
	Update installation and service records in internal systems (CRM/ERP/OSS tools).
	Ensure installations meet company standards for safety, performance, and aesthetics.
	Provide feedback and escalate field challenges when necessary.
	Support enterprise network deployments (remote and on-site).
	Maintain company tools, equipment, and assets.
	Mentor and supervise interns.
	Build strong relationships with customers and internal stakeholders.


Key Performance Indicators


	Installation turnaround time
	First-time-right installation rate
	Customer satisfaction levels
	Accuracy of documentation and reporting.


Requirements
Educational Qualification:


	
	B.Sc in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or related discipline (Minimum of Second Class Upper / Upper Credit).
	


Experience:


	1–2 years of experience in telecoms, ISP, or ICT environment.
	Hands-on experience with network devices (routers, switches).
	Experience in LAN/WAN design and configuration is an advantage.


Technical Skills:


	Basic understanding of IP networking (LAN/WAN, TCP/IP, DHCP, DNS).
	Knowledge of fiber optic and wireless technologies.
	Ability to configure routers and switches.
	Familiarity with troubleshooting tools (ping, traceroute, OTDR, cable testers).
	Understanding of structured cabling and network safety practices.


Soft Skills:


	Strong communication and customer service skills
	Problem-solving and analytical thinking
	Attention to detail
	Team player with a proactive attitude
	Willingness to learn and adapt.


Work Schedule:


	Monday – Friday (8:00 AM – 5:00 PM)
	Occasional weekend work may be required.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: All candidates must ensure that they meet the minimum qualification stated.    

    

        Click here to Apply

At Luxsit integration &ndash; whether the project is new construction or retrofit, we integrate seamlessly with all involved to deliver custom, lifestyle inspired solutions across the spectrum of automation, audio/video, cinema rooms, lighting, climate, and security.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Lagos,
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Staff Management:&nbsp;Hire, train, supervise, and mentor warehouse personnel to improve performance.
	Safety and Security:&nbsp;Implement and enforce health and safety regulations (OSHA) and maintain a secure facility.
	Logistics Coordination:&nbsp;Liaise with vendors, suppliers, and transport companies to manage supply chain logistics.
	Space Optimization:&nbsp;Strategically plan warehouse layouts to ensure efficient space utilization.
	Operations Oversight:&nbsp;Manage daily operations (shipping, receiving, storage, and fulfillment) to maximize productivity.
	Inventory Control:&nbsp;Audit inventory, manage stock levels, and ensure accurate record-keeping


.Required Skills and Qualifications


	Experience:3+ years in a warehouse or logistics role, with experience supervising hourly employees.
	Leadership:Proven ability to lead, motivate, and manage a team.
	Systems Proficiency:Proficient in Warehouse Management Systems (WMS) and Microsoft Office Suite.
	Physical Ability:Ability to work in a, sometimes, fast-paced environment and handle heavy equipment.
	Education:High school diploma or equivalent is required; an Associate&rsquo;s or Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in logistics or supply chain management is preferred.


Core Competencies:


	Excellent organizational and problem-solving skills.
	Strong verbal and written communication skills.
	Deep understanding of safety standards.
	High attention to detail.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;lillian.owoseni@luxsitintegration.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Warehouse Manager Job at Luxsit Integration Limited




        
    

        
        Luxsit Integration Limited is a smart home solution company located in the heart of Lagos. Our main focus is to bring people and technology together. We handle all aspects of your technology project including design, scheduling, project management, installation, and service and support. We are a customer service-oriented company and strive for complete customer satisfaction. With our experienced and trained dedicated team of tech experts, bringing your dreams to reality. At Luxsit integration – whether the project is new construction or retrofit, we integrate seamlessly with all involved to deliver custom, lifestyle inspired solutions across the spectrum of automation, audio/video, cinema rooms, lighting, climate, and security.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse Manager
Job Location: Lekki Lagos,
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Staff Management: Hire, train, supervise, and mentor warehouse personnel to improve performance.
	Safety and Security: Implement and enforce health and safety regulations (OSHA) and maintain a secure facility.
	Logistics Coordination: Liaise with vendors, suppliers, and transport companies to manage supply chain logistics.
	Space Optimization: Strategically plan warehouse layouts to ensure efficient space utilization.
	Operations Oversight: Manage daily operations (shipping, receiving, storage, and fulfillment) to maximize productivity.
	Inventory Control: Audit inventory, manage stock levels, and ensure accurate record-keeping


.Required Skills and Qualifications


	Experience:3+ years in a warehouse or logistics role, with experience supervising hourly employees.
	Leadership:Proven ability to lead, motivate, and manage a team.
	Systems Proficiency:Proficient in Warehouse Management Systems (WMS) and Microsoft Office Suite.
	Physical Ability:Ability to work in a, sometimes, fast-paced environment and handle heavy equipment.
	Education:High school diploma or equivalent is required; an Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree in logistics or supply chain management is preferred.


Core Competencies:


	Excellent organizational and problem-solving skills.
	Strong verbal and written communication skills.
	Deep understanding of safety standards.
	High attention to detail.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Web / Mobile Application Developer",
  "description": "At ipNX, we don&rsquo;t just connect people &mdash; we connect ideas. You&rsquo;ll join a passionate marketing team shaping one of Nigeria&rsquo;s most innovative telecom brands.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Web / Mobile Application Developer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Design, prepare, test, and debug web or mobile program code.
	Prepares test data and conducts unit testing to ensure compliance with specifications
	Analyze automation requests
	Creates work plans, develops schedules, and develops time and cost estimates for projects
	Creates all System Definition Model (SDM) technical documents: Functional Specs, Design docs, etc.
	As an active team member, interfaces with users to gain understanding necessary for enhancements, maintenance, and problem resolution for existing applications; and maintains continuous awareness of users&rsquo; plans/activities relevant to the project
	Translates requirements and specs into computer programs; designs, codes, analyzes, tests and documents computer software programs and systems using full life cycle development techniques
	Prepares routine periodic project status reports and communicates with customers, as needed
	Attends staff and technical meetings for the work unit.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree with 5 - 10 years of experience.


Skills:


	Proven ability to organize, prioritize, and manage multiple projects effectively, deal with changing priorities, and to meet deadlines in a rapidly changing, fast-paced environment
	Effective communication and interpersonal skills to present information and ideas clearly and succinctly and to explain various application software and hardware to end users
	Strong integration skills


Knowledge:


	Demonstrated experience developing applications using PHP, MySQL, and the ability to learn new programming languages. Experience linking Web-based applications to databases using PHP, Perl, Java, and Python;
	Experience working with MVC architecture development using existing frameworks such as Zend, Ruby on Rails
	Knowledge ofthe software development process, quality control, and impact assessment
	Experience with user experience software development using JavaScript, including libraries such as JQuery and/or Prototype, XML, CSS3.0 (with dynamic, responsive web design with mobile devices), and other related UI technologies (HTML5, Flash)
	Demonstrated knowledge in mobile platforms, internet technologies,and user interface
	Experience working in a multi-platform (LINUX, Mac-OS and Windows) environment. Experience working with version control systems (Subversion, Git).


Personal Attributes:


	Strong team player
	Ability to mentor less experienced engineers
	Solid problem solver
	Ability to quickly learn and apply new toolsets, technology and concepts.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV to:&nbsp;lilianadefisoye@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;All candidates must ensure that they meet the minimum qualification stated.",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Web / Mobile Application Developer Job at ipNX Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        At ipNX, we don’t just connect people — we connect ideas. You’ll join a passionate marketing team shaping one of Nigeria’s most innovative telecom brands.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Web / Mobile Application Developer

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Design, prepare, test, and debug web or mobile program code.
	Prepares test data and conducts unit testing to ensure compliance with specifications
	Analyze automation requests
	Creates work plans, develops schedules, and develops time and cost estimates for projects
	Creates all System Definition Model (SDM) technical documents: Functional Specs, Design docs, etc.
	As an active team member, interfaces with users to gain understanding necessary for enhancements, maintenance, and problem resolution for existing applications; and maintains continuous awareness of users’ plans/activities relevant to the project
	Translates requirements and specs into computer programs; designs, codes, analyzes, tests and documents computer software programs and systems using full life cycle development techniques
	Prepares routine periodic project status reports and communicates with customers, as needed
	Attends staff and technical meetings for the work unit.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor’s Degree with 5 - 10 years of experience.


Skills:


	Proven ability to organize, prioritize, and manage multiple projects effectively, deal with changing priorities, and to meet deadlines in a rapidly changing, fast-paced environment
	Effective communication and interpersonal skills to present information and ideas clearly and succinctly and to explain various application software and hardware to end users
	Strong integration skills


Knowledge:


	Demonstrated experience developing applications using PHP, MySQL, and the ability to learn new programming languages. Experience linking Web-based applications to databases using PHP, Perl, Java, and Python;
	Experience working with MVC architecture development using existing frameworks such as Zend, Ruby on Rails
	Knowledge ofthe software development process, quality control, and impact assessment
	Experience with user experience software development using JavaScript, including libraries such as JQuery and/or Prototype, XML, CSS3.0 (with dynamic, responsive web design with mobile devices), and other related UI technologies (HTML5, Flash)
	Demonstrated knowledge in mobile platforms, internet technologies,and user interface
	Experience working in a multi-platform (LINUX, Mac-OS and Windows) environment. Experience working with version control systems (Subversion, Git).


Personal Attributes:


	Strong team player
	Ability to mentor less experienced engineers
	Solid problem solver
	Ability to quickly learn and apply new toolsets, technology and concepts.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: All candidates must ensure that they meet the minimum qualification stated.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Clinical Psychologist",
  "description": "Hugo is a Future-of-Work company. We build and manage remote teams in black communities for some of the world&rsquo;s largest technology and media companies. We specialize in end-to-end machine learning data annotation and omnichannel support solutions that ultimately yield more inclusive outcomes for both black communities globally and our clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Clinical Psychologist

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a qualified Clinical Psychologist to join our team as a Wellbeing Coach within a fast-growing tech organization.
	This role focuses on supporting employee mental health, resilience, and overall wellbeing in a dynamic workplace environment.
	The Wellbeing Coach will provide confidential one-on-one support sessions, facilitate group wellbeing programs, and contribute to mental health awareness initiatives within the company.
	The ideal candidate is passionate about preventive mental health, coaching, and workplace wellbeing, and enjoys working with professionals in a fast-paced corporate setting.


Responsibilities
Employee Psychological Support:


	Conduct confidential one-on-one and group wellbeing coaching sessions with employees.
	Support employees in managing issues such as stress, burnout, anxiety, emotional wellbeing, and work-life balance.
	Help employees develop practical coping strategies, resilience skills, and emotional regulation techniques.
	Identify cases requiring clinical intervention and provide appropriate referrals when necessary.


Wellbeing Programs &amp; Initiatives:


	Design and facilitate wellbeing workshops, group sessions, and webinars for employees.
	Deliver sessions on topics such as stress management, emotional intelligence, resilience, productivity, and healthy workplace habits.
	Contribute to the development of mental health awareness campaigns and wellbeing initiatives across the organization.


Employee Engagement &amp; Culture:


	Promote a workplace culture where mental wellbeing is normalized and supported.
	Participate in employee onboarding programs to introduce available wellbeing resources.
	Collaborate with HR, People Operations, and leadership teams to identify emerging wellbeing needs.


Crisis Support &amp; Risk Management:


	Provide initial psychological support to employees experiencing distress.
	Conduct basic risk assessments where necessary and escalate high-risk cases appropriately.
	Maintain strict confidentiality and professional ethical standards in all employee interactions.


Documentation &amp; Reporting:


	Maintain accurate documentation of sessions in line with confidentiality and ethical guidelines.
	Track engagement metrics and wellbeing trends to inform program improvements.
	Provide periodic reports and insights to support organizational wellbeing strategy.


Qualification &amp; Experience


	Master&rsquo;s degree (M.Sc. or M.Phil.) in Clinical Psychology from a recognized institution.
	Must be registered with the Nigerian Association of Clinical Psychologists (NACP) or a relevant professional regulatory body.
	Membership with the Nigerian Psychological Association (NPA) will be an added advantage.
	Experience
	Minimum of 2 &ndash; 5 years of professional experience in clinical psychology, counselling, or mental health practice.
	Experience conducting individual psychological support sessions or therapy.
	Previous experience in corporate wellbeing, Employee Assistance Programs (EAP), or workplace mental health initiatives will be an added advantage.


Core Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Strong active listening and empathy skills
	Excellent interpersonal and communication skills
	Ability to translate psychological knowledge into practical workplace wellbeing strategies
	Strong facilitation and presentation skills
	High level of emotional intelligence
	Strong confidentiality and ethical practice
	Ability to manage sensitive and high-risk cases appropriately
	Good documentation and reporting skills
	Ability to work collaboratively within cross-functional teams


Preferred Qualifications


	Training in therapeutic approaches such as Cognitive Behavioural Therapy (CBT), Solution-Focused Therapy, or Coaching Psychology
	Experience working with young professionals in high-performance environments
	Experience facilitating corporate training or group wellbeing sessions
	Familiarity with digital wellbeing platforms and virtual coaching tools


what we Provide:


	Hugo offers a hybrid work environment that balances employee flexibility with a collegial, fun &ldquo;office&rdquo; culture.
	We pride ourselves on offering a dynamic environment where ambitious professionals can make a measurable impact and accelerate their career. Our compensation and benefits are highly competitive.

Clinical Psychologist Job at Hugo




        
    

        
        Hugo is a Future-of-Work company. We build and manage remote teams in black communities for some of the world’s largest technology and media companies. We specialize in end-to-end machine learning data annotation and omnichannel support solutions that ultimately yield more inclusive outcomes for both black communities globally and our clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Clinical Psychologist

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description

	We are seeking a qualified Clinical Psychologist to join our team as a Wellbeing Coach within a fast-growing tech organization.
	This role focuses on supporting employee mental health, resilience, and overall wellbeing in a dynamic workplace environment.
	The Wellbeing Coach will provide confidential one-on-one support sessions, facilitate group wellbeing programs, and contribute to mental health awareness initiatives within the company.
	The ideal candidate is passionate about preventive mental health, coaching, and workplace wellbeing, and enjoys working with professionals in a fast-paced corporate setting.


Responsibilities
Employee Psychological Support:


	Conduct confidential one-on-one and group wellbeing coaching sessions with employees.
	Support employees in managing issues such as stress, burnout, anxiety, emotional wellbeing, and work-life balance.
	Help employees develop practical coping strategies, resilience skills, and emotional regulation techniques.
	Identify cases requiring clinical intervention and provide appropriate referrals when necessary.


Wellbeing Programs & Initiatives:


	Design and facilitate wellbeing workshops, group sessions, and webinars for employees.
	Deliver sessions on topics such as stress management, emotional intelligence, resilience, productivity, and healthy workplace habits.
	Contribute to the development of mental health awareness campaigns and wellbeing initiatives across the organization.


Employee Engagement & Culture:


	Promote a workplace culture where mental wellbeing is normalized and supported.
	Participate in employee onboarding programs to introduce available wellbeing resources.
	Collaborate with HR, People Operations, and leadership teams to identify emerging wellbeing needs.


Crisis Support & Risk Management:


	Provide initial psychological support to employees experiencing distress.
	Conduct basic risk assessments where necessary and escalate high-risk cases appropriately.
	Maintain strict confidentiality and professional ethical standards in all employee interactions.


Documentation & Reporting:


	Maintain accurate documentation of sessions in line with confidentiality and ethical guidelines.
	Track engagement metrics and wellbeing trends to inform program improvements.
	Provide periodic reports and insights to support organizational wellbeing strategy.


Qualification & Experience


	Master’s degree (M.Sc. or M.Phil.) in Clinical Psychology from a recognized institution.
	Must be registered with the Nigerian Association of Clinical Psychologists (NACP) or a relevant professional regulatory body.
	Membership with the Nigerian Psychological Association (NPA) will be an added advantage.
	Experience
	Minimum of 2 – 5 years of professional experience in clinical psychology, counselling, or mental health practice.
	Experience conducting individual psychological support sessions or therapy.
	Previous experience in corporate wellbeing, Employee Assistance Programs (EAP), or workplace mental health initiatives will be an added advantage.


Core Skills & Competencies:


	Strong active listening and empathy skills
	Excellent interpersonal and communication skills
	Ability to translate psychological knowledge into practical workplace wellbeing strategies
	Strong facilitation and presentation skills
	High level of emotional intelligence
	Strong confidentiality and ethical practice
	Ability to manage sensitive and high-risk cases appropriately
	Good documentation and reporting skills
	Ability to work collaboratively within cross-functional teams


Preferred Qualifications


	Training in therapeutic approaches such as Cognitive Behavioural Therapy (CBT), Solution-Focused Therapy, or Coaching Psychology
	Experience working with young professionals in high-performance environments
	Experience facilitating corporate training or group wellbeing sessions
	Familiarity with digital wellbeing platforms and virtual coaching tools


what we Provide:


	Hugo offers a hybrid work environment that balances employee flexibility with a collegial, fun “office” culture.
